description: Capability set for the Atelier shell. Deliberately narrow: the webview only needs the `event` API (so the frontend can subscribe to `atelier://event`), the `core:default` permissions (window-close, drag, etc.), and the `dialog:allow-open` permission (native folder picker for the v60.46 workspace selector). Everything else — fs, shell, http — stays denied so the webview can't bypass the §15 dispatcher's sandbox.
